channel.title: Noise-Functions on Himalaya's Dev Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Noise-Functions on Himalaya's Dev Journal

item.title: My Journey into Procedural Generation
item.description: How Perlin noise, cellular automata, and L-systems helped me create interesting-looking worlds for my game.

item.title: NoiseGen — Procedural Texture Library
item.description: A TypeScript library for generating procedural textures using Perlin noise, Worley noise, and fractal Brownian motion.
